name: QuickChart MCP Server
what_it_does: QuickChart MCP server enabling AI agents to generate charts and graphs via QuickChart's API — creating bar, line, pie, radar and other chart types, rendering data visualizations as images, and integrating chart generation into agent-driven data analysis and reporting workflows.
use_cases: Generating data visualization charts from data analysis agents
Creating business report charts from reporting agents
Visualizing numerical data from research and analysis agents
Producing chart images for documents and presentations from content agents
Rendering statistical visualizations from data science agents
Adding visual data context to analysis outputs from AI assistant agents
not_for: Interactive charts (QuickChart generates static images, not interactive visualizations)
Complex custom chart types beyond Chart.js support
best_when: An agent needs to generate chart images from data — QuickChart provides a simple URL-based chart generation API without requiring local chart libraries.
avoid_when: You need interactive charts, real-time updates, or complex custom visualizations.

auth.notes: No authentication required for basic usage. QuickChart free tier available without credentials. QuickChart API key for higher rate limits and private charts.

pricing.free_tier_limits: QuickChart: free tier with watermark and rate limits
pricing.paid_tiers: QuickChart paid: $9-49/month for watermark-free and higher limits
pricing.notes: QuickChart free tier adds watermark. MCP server is free open source. Paid tier removes watermark.

performance.rate_limits: Free tier: rate limited; paid tier: higher limits

known_agent_gotchas: Free tier adds QuickChart watermark — use paid tier for production charts
Chart.js configuration format required — agents must know Chart.js schema
Large or complex charts may time out on free tier
Community MCP from GongRzhe — wraps QuickChart API
Generated images are temporary URLs — download and store if persistence needed
Some Chart.js plugins not available on QuickChart free tier
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. No credentials for basic use. Chart data sent to QuickChart servers — avoid sensitive data in charts. Community MCP. Paid plan for production use.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Data sent to QuickChart servers. Community MCP. Avoid sensitive data in chart inputs.
